tags.label: GenerativeArtGallery — artwork4 (Botanical Growth)
tags.description: Adapted from the L-system botanical sketch. Tree structure is pre-computed via recursive branching (max depth 6–9) and cached, rebuilding only when style or depth changes. Each branch stores its angle and seed value. Per-frame wind applies a sin-based sway to each branch endpoint proportional to depth fraction and the branch's unique seed phase. Leaf positions are deterministic via p.noise() so they don't flicker.
